summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification completed using the hydrated cluster preflight artifact as live state. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. No security-sensitive items were detected, and no close, merge, fix, or PR-raising actions are allowed by the job gates.

actions.reason: Independent open PR requiring normal maintainer review; no duplicate/superseded evidence and close/merge/fix are not appropriate in this plan shard.
Independent feature PR; security-boundary label alone is not a route_security trigger under the provided OpenClaw posture without a boundary-bypass claim.
Independent bugfix PR with useful implementation and tests; no close-style classification is supported.
Independent docs PR; close_low_signal is blocked by job gates and no duplicate/superseded canonical is hydrated.
Independent bugfix PR with failing proof gate; keep open for author/maintainer follow-up.
Independent feature/API PR requiring normal review and proof repair.
Independent gateway hardening bugfix; no dedupe or closeout evidence.
Independent PR with conflicts/failing checks; keep open for repair or maintainer review rather than close.
Independent draft PR; security-boundary label does not establish a security report, and draft state blocks merge-style actions.
Independent bugfix PR with useful code and tests; no duplicate/superseded evidence.
Independent config bugfix PR with failing checks; keep open for repair rather than close.
Independent draft PR needing proof/work; not eligible for closeout or merge.
Independent PR with conflict/proof blockers; security-boundary label alone is not enough to route security under the provided policy.
Independent gateway feature PR; useful implementation should remain in normal maintainer review.
Independent feature PR; no closure or dedupe action supported.
Independent docs/test PR with conflict state; keep open for repair or maintainer review.
